name: BIODELIVERY SCIENCES INTL INC.R
summary: BioDelivery Sciences International, Inc. is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative products for pain management and other serious conditions using its BioErodible MucoAdhesive (BEMA) technology. Their products aim to improve drug delivery and patient outcomes. BioDelivery Sciences International is headquartered in Raleigh, North Carolina.
